title: Residential Terrace Garden
description: A stunning transformation of a residential terrace into a lush, green oasis. Complete with lawn area, ornamental plants, and seating space.

title: Commercial Office Landscape
description: Modern landscaping for a commercial office building featuring drought-resistant plants and minimalist design.

title: Apartment Vertical Garden
description: Space-saving vertical garden installation in an apartment balcony, bringing greenery to urban living.
